name: Single IP with Multiple MAC Addresses
notes: This rule triggers when a single IP's MAC address changes multiple times over a period of time.
conditions_text: when the MAC changes more than 6 times within 1 hours on a single host
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DHCP Servers
thresholds: when the MAC changes more than 6 times within 1 hours on a single host
TD_list: APPLY Single IP with Multiple MAC Addresses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the MAC changes more than 6 times within 1 hours on a single host
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: DHCP Servers
